title: TOUGH MASTER Rubber Mallet 16oz Fiberglass Shaft Non Slip Grip Handle with Ergonomic TPR Finish Super Strong High Elastic Rubber Head Lightweight Overstrike Protection Light Strong Hand Tool for DIY
features: BLACK & WHITE COMBINATION: With a black and white rubber head, this rubber mallet protects surfaces from damage and is fit for multiple purposes: Use the black side for general work such as laying paving tiles, and the white, mark-free side for mouldings that require high precision, such as laying parquet and laminate

ULTRA-DURABLE STRIKING HEAD: The mallet hammer has a super-strong, high elastic rubber head that will not damage materials during use or create impact marks. It is almost impossible to damage, crack, or break under pressure, so you can strike as hard as necessary to complete your tasks

ERGONOMIC FIBERGLASS HANDLE: This large rubber mallet has a three-component, strengthened fiberglass handle core that helps to absorb vibrations, reducing the pressure on your body as you hammer. The ergonomic TPR rubber cover on the handle provides a comfortable grip and prevents slippage

LIGHTWEIGHT: Unlike conventional metal mallets, the TOUGH MASTER rubber mallet with fiberglass shaft is incredibly lightweight, making it less likely to cause an accident if you miss a stroke. It is also easier to carry which will reduce your fatigue levels as you use the sturdy hand tool

REINFORCED OVER STRIKE PROTECTION: The strong combination rubber mallet has reinforced overstrike protection to increase durability between the striking head and the fiberglass handle - the most common point of breakage. This will ensure the double faced rubber mallet lasts for years to come

VERSATILE USE: This is an ideal tool for a variety of professional trades people and has many purposes. Use the TM-RM16F camping mallet for flooring, tent stakes, woodworking, thin metal plates, jewelry, laminate, soft blow tasks, construction, auto work, carpentry, or any other task you require it for
description: Product Description Product Description ALL ABOUT TOUGH MASTER At TOUGH MASTER, we offer a comprehensive portfolio of tools, work wear, and accessories for professional trades people. Since our start-up in 2015, we’ve steadily gained a reputation for industrial-grade and top tier products. TOUGH MASTER 16 OZ RUBBER MALLET Rubber Mallet This rubber mallet has a black side that can be used for general work, while the white side can be used for jobs that require high precision without causing marks. The striking head has strong elastic to prevent damage to your materials, and its ergonomic fiberglass handle absorbs vibrations as you cause blows. The mallet is lightweight, has reduced over strike protection, and is multi-purpose. Benefits Black & white combination Use the rubber mallet for multiple purposes. The black side of the rubber can be used for general work while the white, mark-free side can be used for moldings that require high precision. Ultra-durable striking head The mallet hammer has a super-strong, high elastic rubber head that will not damage materials during use or create impact marks. It is almost impossible to damage, crack, or break under pressure. Ergonomic fiberglass handle This large rubber mallet has a three-component, strengthened fiberglass handle core that helps to absorb vibrations, reducing the pressure on your body as you hammer. The ergonomic TPR rubber cover on the handle provides a comfortable grip and prevents slippage. Lightweight Unlike conventional metal mallets, the TOUGH MASTER rubber mallet with fiberglass shaft is incredibly lightweight, making it less likely to cause an accident if you miss a stroke. It is also easier to carry which will reduce your fatigue levels as you use the sturdy hand tool. Reinforced overstrike protection The strong combination rubber mallet has reinforced over strike protection to increase durability between the striking head and the fiberglass handle - the most common point of breakage. This will ensure the double faced rubber mallet lasts for years to come. Versatile use This is an ideal tool for a variety of professional tradespeople and has many purposes. Use the rubber mallet camping mallet for flooring, tent stakes, woodworking, thin metal plates, jewelry, laminate, soft blow tasks, construction, auto work, carpentry, or any other task you require it for.
